evals.prompt: What schemas are available in the test-ai project? Give me a quick summary of what tables and structures exist.
evals.expected_output: Reads .cortex/settings.json for active project, then reads .cortex/MAP.md for orientation, then reads .cortex/projects/test-ai/shadow-index.json to list schema artifacts. Presents available tables/views/functions with their logical IDs.

evals.prompt: I need to understand the fraud detection logic in the checkout-api service. Where is it and what does it say?
evals.expected_output: Reads .cortex/MAP.md to orient, resolves the logical ID for the fraud detection logic (e.g. payment-system:checkout-api:logic:fraud-detection) from the project shadow-index, reads the resolved file, and summarizes the content.

evals.prompt: What personas are loaded in this cortex project and which one should I use for database schema work?
evals.expected_output: Reads .cortex/MAP.md and .cortex/shadow-index.json to list available personas (core:personas:*). Reads each persona file via resolved path. Recommends the dba persona for database schema work and explains its capabilities.
